questions.question: Given a discrete uniform random variable X with possible values 1, 2, and 3, calculate its mathematical expectation. What is the expected value of X if the probability of each value is 1/3?
questions.hint: Use the formula for discrete uniform distribution

questions.question: A random variable X has a probability distribution given by P(X=1) = 0.3, P(X=2) = 0.4, P(X=3) = 0.3. Calculate the mathematical expectation of X. Show your working.
questions.hint: Use the formula for discrete probability distribution

questions.question: A random variable X follows an exponential distribution with parameter λ = 2. Calculate its mathematical expectation. Explain the meaning of this result.
questions.hint: Use the formula for exponential distribution
